title: Agent eval use-case spec
description: A single D365FO implementation use-case for the agent eval loop. See docs/AGENT_EVAL_LOOP.md section 8.

id.description: Stable case id, e.g. L1-table-basic. Prefix is the complexity tier.

tier.description: Complexity tier L0-L4. Must match the id prefix.

instruction.description: The natural-language task the agent must implement using only the grounded tool path.

target_artifact_types.description: AOT object types the case is expected to produce, e.g. AxTable, AxClass, AxForm.

golden_path.description: Repo-relative path to the golden metadata folder for this case.

systest.description: Optional repo-relative path to a SysTest definition for runtime correctness.

ignore.description: Per-case normalisation exceptions: element paths legitimately allowed to vary in the golden diff.

tags.description: Free-form tags for clustering, e.g. table, coc, form, security.
